summary: Crisp soundboard recording captures a well‑played, high‑energy show with good vibes throughout.
review: The reviewers note that the soundboard (SBD) feed is crisp, though they prefer the audience mix for its extra bass. The band was in good spirits, weather perfect and energy high, delivering solid performances of every song without any glaring flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review gives a clear positive impression of both performance and recording quality, but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard is described as crisp; reviewer prefers audience mix for more bass, indicating overall clarity but a slight tonal preference.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Straightforward set with every song well played; high energy and good vibe throughout the night.
